## 🧪 Comprehensive API Test Notebook

This notebook tests **every API** in the JS Notebook project.

Run all cells to verify everything works!

## 1. Basic JavaScript

Console, math, arrays, objects

## 2. web.sleep

Pause execution

## 3. web.fetch

HTTP requests

## 4. web.storage

Local storage

## 5. web.url

URL parsing and encoding

## 6. web.clipboard

Clipboard read/write

## 7. web.log

Browser console logging

## 8. web.mock_async

Async testing helper

## 9. web.tab

Tab operations

## 10. web.bookmarks

Bookmark operations

## 11. web.history

History operations

## 12. web.cookies

Cookie operations

## 13. web.notifications

Notification operations

## 14. fs

Virtual filesystem

## 15. crypto

Hashing and encoding

## 16. chrome.tabs

Chrome tabs API

## 17. chrome.storage.local

Extension storage

## 18. chrome.bookmarks

Bookmark API

## 19. chrome.history

History API

## 20. chrome.cookies

Cookie API

## 21. page

Page interaction

## 22. sidepanel

Sidepanel interaction

## 23. dom

DOM snapshot

## 24. runtime

Runtime inspection

## 25. host.call

Host bridge

## 26. chrome.alarms

Alarm API

## 27. chrome.notifications

Notification API

## 28. chrome.windows

Window API

## 29. chrome.action

Action API

## 30. chrome.contextMenus

Context menu API

## 31. chrome.sidePanel

Sidepanel API

## 32. chrome.scripting

Scripting API

## 33. chrome.runtime

Runtime API

## ✅ Test Complete

All API tests completed! Check the outputs above for any failures.
